{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-190", "name": "Integer Overflow or Wraparound"}], "description": "A bounds check was performed in floating points before a cast to the index passed to an unchecked access function. This checked considered `NaN` cases improperly, causing them to succeed the check instead of failing it. The floating point coordinate is under caller control by passing a selected projection matrix.

Carefully controlling the coordinates of an image with no data and one non-zero dimension provides an arbitrary read primitive in the first 32-bits of address space with a Bilinear sampling method.

Using bicubic sampling can result in a read of a few bytes beyond an allocation.

Other out-of-bounds reads may be possible.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qg8r-f7x3-25f7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T03:10:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qg8r-f7x3-25f7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qg8r-f7x3-25f7"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-07T03:10:13Z", "references": ["https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0117.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qg8r-f7x3-25f7"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/image-rs/imageproc", "summary": "imageproc: Out-of-bounds read via NaN coordinates in bilinear/bicubic sampling", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-07T03:10:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qg8r-f7x3-25f7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.23.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "imageproc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.23.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.24.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "imageproc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 0.24.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.25.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "imageproc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 0.25.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "imageproc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.26.0, < 0.26.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: imageproc: Out-of-bounds read via NaN coordinates in bilinear/bicubic sampling
